title: LiveBlastProbe
description: One live-blast probe declaration. Named by ActionType.live_probe_ref. See docs/roadmap/execution-model.md 4 and docs/roadmap/action-ontology.md 6. Month-1+; the risk-gate reads the interpretation function to classify a target as quiet/active/overloaded and cap autonomy accordingly.

id.description: Stable id an ActionType.live_probe_ref points at.

adapter_ref.description: DI seam id resolving to a LiveBlastProbe adapter (e.g. probe-adapters/azure-monitor).

adapter_payload.description: Adapter-specific configuration (e.g. KQL query, metric namespace). Deliberately schema-free so a fork can bind any adapter; the adapter validates its own payload.

interpretation.description: Deterministic thresholds mapping the raw probe result onto the three-level ceiling axis (see execution-model.md 2.4).

quiet.description: Expression the risk-gate evaluates against the adapter result; true = quiet.

active.description: Expression evaluated when quiet is false; true = active.

overloaded.description: Expression evaluated last; true = overloaded (caps at shadow_only).

timeout_seconds.description: Hard timeout the risk-gate enforces on a single probe call. On timeout, axis returns 'active' (fail toward safety).

cache_ttl_seconds.description: Result cache duration. A replay within TTL returns the cached answer verbatim (execution-model.md 7 - determinism).
